title: Titration methods for rVSV-based vaccine manufacturing
author: Gélinas, Kiesslich, et al.

steps.title: Statistical analysis
steps.instruction: Mean and standard deviations, represented as error bars in figures, as well as unpaired Welch's t-tests were calculated using Prism 8.2.0 (GraphPad, La Jolla, CA, USA). Statistical power was evaluated using the G*Power 3.1.9.2 software (University of Düsseldorf, Düsseldorf, Germany) [25] using an a priori t test to determine the required sample size to observe the difference between two independent means with an α error probability of 0.05.
